name: X-Saber Urbellum
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｘ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エックス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－セイバー ウルベルム
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters
When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent while they have 4 or more cards in their hand, place 1 random card from their hand on top of their Deck.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters

eff:

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
Places cards from the opponent's hand on the top of the Deck
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
